# Electrical Safety

**Summary**: Measures to prevent electrical shocks and fire hazards caused by faulty wiring.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2000-hashmi|Hashmi, 2000]] assessed electrical-safety in residential units.

## Scientific Context

- [[2000-hashmi|Hashmi, 2000]] identified as the primary cause of fire accidents in Saudi Arabia.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2000-hashmi|Hashmi, 2000]] assessment of wiring, grounding, and outlet availability.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- 63.1% of residents do not have grounded electrical wiring. ([[2000-hashmi|Hashmi, 2000, p. 120]])
